messages.content: 润色下：把这种图的风景换成在公园里，有樱花的场景
把这张图的背景风景替换为公园场景，并加入樱花元素（樱花树/樱花飘落），整体氛围更偏春日清新。
描述下这幅图像
画面中是一位卡通风格的警察形象，穿着蓝色制服与黑色领带，戴蓝色警帽，帽徽和胸前徽章为金色。腰间系着配有扣具与装备的黑色警用腰带，手套和靴子为黑色。背景是简洁的纯色（偏棕黄色）墙面与地面，左下角地上放着一个黄色的小物件，形状类似小玩具或道具。
帮我润色下这段话：生成一张图中形象和一只卡通小马形象互动的图片
生成一张图片：让图中角色与一只卡通小马进行互动（如对视、挥手、轻触或并肩玩耍），整体风格保持可爱卡通/玩具质感，画面氛围温馨有趣、光线柔和、构图清晰。
让图中书生形象与一只卡通小马形象进行对视，整体风格保持可爱卡通/玩具质感，画面氛围温馨有趣、光线柔和、构图清晰，背景是在
让图中书生形象与一只卡通小马进行对视互动，整体保持可爱卡通/玩具质感；画面氛围温馨有趣，光线柔和，构图清晰；背景设置在公园里，加入樱花树与少量樱花飘落，营造春日感。

润色下这段话：A graphic design poster for a plant exhibition, with a plain beige background. The
poster features multiple watercolor illustrations depicting various mosses and ferns, primarily
using green, brown, and yellow colors, with delicate black ink outlines. In the center is a large and
intricate illustration of green liverwort with brown sporophytes on top. Other smaller illustrations
are scattered around, including Fissidens in the upper left corner, Rhodobryum giganteum in the
top center, Bryum sp. in the upper right corner, and Marchantia formosana in the lower right corner.
The poster layout is clean and minimalist, with text arranged both vertically and horizontally. In the upper right corner is the vertically arranged black Song-style characters "苔痕", below which is
the horizontally arranged sans-serif English text "Moss Exhibition". On the left side is the black
sans-serif text "Elkhorn Fern LifeStyle". The lower left corner reads "Alishan Moss Ecological". The
date and time are prominently displayed at the bottom: "2001" in large black serif font, followed by
smaller sans-serif text "04.22 [Apr.] am. 09:00" and "05.22 [May] pm. 17:00". Each plant illustration
is accompanied by its scientific name, written in small gray sans-serif font, such as "Fissidens",
"Rhodobryum giganteum", "Bryum sp.", "Bartramiaceae", "Alishan Moss Ecological", "Marchantia
formosana", and "Astrocella yoshinagana". The overall style is elegant and educational, combining
scientific illustration with modern typography

A minimalist graphic-design poster for a plant exhibition on a plain beige background. The composition features multiple watercolor botanical illustrations of mosses and ferns, rendered mainly in greens, browns, and muted yellows, with fine black ink outlines. Centered is a large, highly detailed illustration of green liverwort topped with brown sporophytes. Smaller specimens are arranged around it—Fissidens (upper left), Rhodobryum giganteum (top center), Bryum sp. (upper right), and Marchantia formosana (lower right).

Typography is clean and modern, mixing vertical and horizontal layouts. In the upper right, the vertical black Song-style title reads “苔痕,” with “Moss Exhibition” set beneath in a horizontal sans-serif. Additional sans-serif text appears on the left (“Elkhorn Fern LifeStyle”) and at the lower left (“Alishan Moss Ecological”). The event date and time anchor the bottom: “2001” in large black serif type, followed by smaller sans-serif details—“04.22 [Apr.] am. 09:00” and “05.22 [May] pm. 17:00.”

Each illustration is labeled with its scientific name in small gray sans-serif text, including “Fissidens,” “Rhodobryum giganteum,” “Bryum sp.,” “Bartramiaceae,” “Marchantia formosana,” and “Astrocella yoshinagana.” The overall impression is elegant, educational, and science-forward, blending botanical illustration with contemporary typography.
这里元素太多了，帮我生成一个比较简单的，没有那么多文字

A simplified plant-exhibition poster on a plain beige background. The design is clean and minimalist, featuring one central watercolor botanical illustration (e.g., a moss or liverwort) in soft greens with subtle brown accents and fine ink outlines. Use very limited typography: a short vertical Chinese title “苔痕” on the right, and a small horizontal subtitle “Moss Exhibition” beneath it. Remove the extra side text, most labels, and detailed date blocks, leaving plenty of negative space for an elegant, modern look.
把POP MART的字改成等长的一个短语
把“POP MART”替换为一个**等长（8个字符，含空格）**的短语，例如：**“MOSS FAIR”**。
换成一个表达情绪的 等长短语
可以换成等长（8个字符，含空格）的情绪短语，例如：**“PURE JOY”**。
不要
可以改成等长（8个字符，含空格）的情绪短语，例如：**“CALM DAYS”**。
Replace the text "POP MART" with "Hey "
Replace the text **“POP MART”** with **“Hey ”** (H-e-y followed by a trailing space), keeping the same font style, size, alignment, and placement as the original.
Hey后面在接四字词语

Here are some four-letter words you can append after **“Hey ”** (forming **“Hey ____”**):

- Hey Mood  
- Hey Joys  
- Hey Calm  
- Hey Glow  
- Hey Hype  
- Hey Vibe  
- Hey Zen!  
- Hey Hope  
- Hey Play  
- Hey Chill
